name: Crustless Spinach Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw and squeeze the spinach dry.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. Saute onion in oil until tender in a large skillet.
4. Add spinach and cook until excess moisture evaporates; allow to cool.
5. Combine eggs, cheese, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
6. Stir the egg mixture into the cooled spinach.
7. Pour the filling into a greased 9-inch pie plate.
8. Bake for 30 minutes or until set.
